data.name: Elf World Adventure 12: Winter Episode!
data.detailed_description:
Elf World Adventure 12: Winter Episode is a winter-themed episode of the popular H-game in the anime and puzzle genre, transporting you to a snowy and cozy world of elf girls.

New winter-themed levels await you, where you assemble images of charming elf girls dressed in warm and elegant winter outfits. Snowy backgrounds, soft lighting, and calm music create the feeling of a true winter fairy tale.

The game combines relaxing gameplay, pleasant visual aesthetics, and familiar puzzle mechanics that will appeal to both long-time fans of the series and new players. Complete levels, unlock beautiful images, and earn achievements to decorate your Steam profile.

Game features:
❄️ Winter episode: a unique festive atmosphere and snowy locations
🧩 Engaging puzzles: simple and enjoyable puzzle gameplay
🎄 Beautiful elf girls: cute winter outfits and charming designs
🎶 Calm music: a relaxing soundtrack
🏆 Steam achievements: decorate your profile with rewards
🎮 Easy and accessible gameplay: perfect for relaxation

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 11 (64 bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 10)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 11 (64 bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 12)
